result.status_detail: claude APF v2.2.4 d29d868 verify — APF block warning rendered cleanly to user. After submitting PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) on logged-in claude.ai (plantynet account, Sonnet 4.6), the assistant turn area displayed ONLY the APF warning text: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (Sensitive information request blocked by security policy). User's PII prompt was echoed back as user message bubble, but no Claude model response was generated — replaced entirely by warning. Warning text clearly contains expected '차단' keyword. A 'This conversation could not be found' toast and 4 console 404 errors on /chat_conversations/{id} confirm the chat-create API was intercepted/rejected at network layer (APF engine intercept fired before/during conversation persistence), and the APF-injected warning bubble was rendered in its place. Mission anchor (PII prompt → warning visible on user screen) FULLY satisfied.
result.warning_text_observed: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

console_evidence.notes: 4x 404 (Not Found) on https://claude.ai/api/organizations/{org}/chat_conversations/00be1713-... — REACT_QUERY_CLIENT QueryClient error 'This conversation could not be found'. Indicates APF intercepted the conversation persist/fetch path. UI 'This conversation could not be found' toast also visible alongside the APF warning bubble.

notes: Test flow: From ChatGPT-Chrome window, opened new tab via Ctrl+T → typed https://claude.ai into URL bar → page loaded as claude.ai/new (logged-in 'plantynet' session, Sonnet 4.6 selected by default). Composer (id=22 ContentEditable 'Claude에게 프롬프트를 입력하세요') accepted the PII prompt directly via windows-mcp Type with press_enter=true. URL transitioned to claude.ai/chat/00be1713-b4d9-42cc-8418-d3080e8ca33e. Waited 15s for response. Snapshot+screenshot confirmed: assistant turn area shows ONLY the APF warning '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (no Claude tokens, no fallback model error). User prompt bubble preserved with full RRN visible (rrn_in_dom=true). Verdict OK because: warning_visible=true, expected_text='차단' found in warning, engine_intercept_fired=true (chat_conversations API returned 404 — APF blocked persistence), apf_dom_marker_present=true (warning matches APF block-page template '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다'). v2.2.4 d29d868 claude warning rendering CONFIRMED working in logged-in claude.ai session.
